subject: a boot stamping down with cracked earth and two radiating shockwave rings
prompt: a boot stamping down with cracked earth and two radiating shockwave rings. A grim dark-fantasy game ability icon for a brutal gladiator arena game set in a scorched desert. Hand-inked woodcut illustration: one bold central silhouette filling about 80% of the frame, heavy black ink, rough expressive hatching, sun-bleached bone (#f0e8d8) highlights carving the shape out of the dark, scorched sand-ochre (#b39763) midtones like heat-baked dust settled on every surface, and a arena red (#d94141) accent burning on the focal element. Gladiatorial desert materials: hammered bronze, cracked leather wraps, sun-split wood, rust and dried blood. A rough aged-bone die-cut outline traces the whole silhouette, like a woodcut poster cut from pale paper — it separates the shape from a near-black UI. Grim, sun-scoured, blood-and-sand mood — never cute, never photorealistic, never a clean flat vector. Chunky shapes that stay readable at 32 pixels. The cut-out floats alone on a fully transparent background — no backdrop, no glow, no vignette; every pixel outside the cut line is transparent. No text.
